name: Recycled Glass Soap Dispenser Clear - Threshold™
description:
The Recycled Glass Soap Dispenser from Threshold™ provides a clean, modern update to your bathroom decor. This soap dispenser is made from 100% recycled glass, and it comes in a distinctive rectangular shape with rounded corners for a sleek, design-forward look. The dispenser holds 15 ounces and is compatible with most liquid hand soaps, and the neutral design blends easily with a wide variety of decor and design aesthetics.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
